descriptions.general: Manage HomeRail interface and general preferences.
descriptions.git: Manage Git server tokens. Projects and repositories are linked when adding a directory.
descriptions.providers: Manage providers, model capabilities, and locally encrypted model settings.
descriptions.voice: Configure voice output and button controls.
descriptions.default: Configure local capabilities used by HomeRail Agent UI.

general.title: General
general.description: These preferences apply to this device and are saved automatically.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language used by the HomeRail interface.

storage.title: Storage & Retention
storage.description: Configure how long completed run workspaces are retained.
storage.autoCleanupDescription: Automatically removes only terminal, unpinned workspaces past their retention period. Manual preview and cleanup remain available when disabled.
storage.cleanupConfirm: Delete unpinned run workspaces past their retention period now? Run records and evidence will not be deleted.

git.linkHint: This page manages tokens only. Directory links are configured elsewhere.
git.savedSummary: {count} token settings · Tokens are encrypted at rest
git.empty: No Git servers yet. Add a Gitea, GitHub, or GitLab token to get started.
git.name: Name

models.runtimeSubtitle: Model used by the current session
models.runtimeHint: New Manager sessions will use the selected model after you switch the runtime. Existing sessions are not affected.
models.codexRuntimeHint: Local Codex CLI · Current settings follow the auto-detected capabilities
models.empty: No model settings yet. Use Add model to create one.

providers.title: Custom providers
providers.subtitle: Define a provider first, then fetch and add models for a specific purpose.
providers.deleteCascade: Delete provider and {count} model | Delete provider and {count} models
providers.deleteCascadeConfirm: Delete custom provider {name} and this {count} model setting: {models}? This cannot be undone. | Delete custom provider {name} and these {count} model settings: {models}? This cannot be undone.
providers.createFirst: Create the provider before adding models

form.probeFailed: Discovery failed: {error}. You can still select a preset model below.
form.allAdded: All models for this credential are already in the configuration list.
form.pendingConfigs: Pending model settings (using the API key above)
form.aliasPlaceholder: Alias (leave blank to use model ID)
form.keepKey: Leave blank to keep the existing key
form.reuseCredential: Reuse the saved credential for this provider
form.discoverModels: Fetch the provider model list, then select a model

voice.narrationDescription: Control TTS output from the Codex Voice Agent.
voice.commentaryDescription: Narrate commentary updates while keeping final answers enabled. Codex only.
voice.controlsDescription: Bind an external button and adjust when speech is submitted.
voice.inputButtonDescription: Desktop uses WebHID. Other devices can use a keyboard or remote button.
voice.microphoneDescription: Android TV prefers USB, headset, or external microphones automatically. Select one manually when several are available.
voice.hidBindingDescription: The bound HID device and report bytes.
voice.keyboardBindingDescription: A Bluetooth keyboard or remote button.
voice.keyboardAvailable: Keyboard-style input devices can be captured.
voice.sendDelayDescription: Wait this long after silence before submitting speech.
voice.vadSaved: VAD silence timeout saved as {seconds} seconds
voice.deviceListUnsupported: This browser cannot list microphone devices.
voice.inputAutomatic: Microphone input returned to automatic selection
voice.insecureContext: This page is not a secure context, so WebHID is unavailable. Use HTTPS or localhost.
voice.hidUnsupported: This browser does not support WebHID. Use Chrome or Edge.
voice.selectHid: Select the DJI Mic receiver, then press the button you want to bind.
voice.bindingTimeout: Timed out waiting for a button. Try binding again.
voice.pressKeyboard: Press the button on the smart glasses or Bluetooth remote that you want to bind.

wireguard.saved: WireGuard configuration saved to this Android TV
wireguard.authorize: Approve the Android VPN request on the TV. It will connect automatically afterward.
wireguard.clearConfirm: Clear the WireGuard configuration saved on this Android TV?
wireguard.imported: Fields populated from the WireGuard configuration
